title: Polystachya hologlossa
taxonomy: Polystachya hologlossa is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. The classification of Polystachya hologlossa is part of the broader classification of the genus Polystachya, which is a genus of orchids within the subtribe Polystachyinae. The subtribe Polystachyinae is part of the tribe Vandeae, which is a large and diverse group of orchids. The Vandeae tribe is a subtribe within the subfamily Orchidoideae.
